tasks.task: Simplify FeatureSpec to name and dim only
tasks.description: Remove dtype and description fields from FeatureSpec in both feature_provider_base.py and model_schema.py.

steps.description: Update FeatureSpec in feature_provider_base.py to only have name and dim fields
Update FeatureSpec in model_schema.py to match the simplified structure
Update FeatureValidationResult to remove expected_dim/actual_dim if needed
Update _load_metadata() to parse low_dim format from training exports
Update __init__.py exports if needed

tasks.acceptance-criteria: FeatureSpec dataclass contains only name (str) and dim (int) fields. All references to dtype and description are removed. _load_metadata() correctly parses low_dim format: {'low_dim': [{'name': '...', 'dim': N}, ...]}.

unit: FeatureSpec instantiation with name='to_target_b', dim=3 succeeds
FeatureSpec raises TypeError when dtype or description arguments are passed
_load_metadata() parses YAML with low_dim key and returns list of FeatureSpec
_load_metadata() raises KeyError when low_dim key is missing

tasks.description: Delete the old model_discovery.py file and clean up any imports referencing it.

steps.description: Delete src/neural_manager/model_discovery.py
Search and remove any imports of ModelDiscoverer, DiscoveredModel, ModelMetadata
Update neural_manager __init__.py if it exports model_discovery symbols

tasks.acceptance-criteria: model_discovery.py file is deleted. No code references ModelDiscoverer, DiscoveredModel, or ModelMetadata classes. Project still imports without errors.

unit: Importing neural_manager package succeeds without model_discovery errors
grep finds zero matches for 'from model_discovery import' in src/

tasks.description: Implement new discovery class that scans policies/<task>/ directories and returns latest revision by timestamp.

steps.description: Create src/features/revision_discoverer.py with RevisionDiscoverer class
Implement discover_latest(artifacts_root, task) method
Implement _parse_revision_name() to extract timestamp from revision directory
Implement _validate_revision() to check model.onnx and observations_metadata.yaml exist
Add RevisionDiscoverer to features/__init__.py exports

tasks.acceptance-criteria: RevisionDiscoverer.discover_latest(root, task) scans <root>/policies/<task>/ directory, filters valid revisions (both files present), sorts by timestamp descending, returns path to latest revision directory. Returns None if no valid revisions found.

unit: _parse_revision_name('vtol_hover-20260302T143015Z-abcdef12-a1b2c3d4') returns dict with task, timestamp, commit, hash
_validate_revision() returns True when both model.onnx and observations_metadata.yaml exist
_validate_revision() returns False when either file is missing
discover_latest() returns None when task directory does not exist
discover_latest() returns None when no valid revisions found
integration: discover_latest() with temp directory containing multiple revisions returns newest by timestamp
discover_latest() correctly isolates tasks (vtol_hover vs vtol_nav)

tasks.description: Add class method to FeatureProviderBase that uses RevisionDiscoverer to auto-discover and initialize from latest revision.

steps.description: Add from_latest_revision(artifacts_root, task) class method to FeatureProviderBase
Method uses RevisionDiscoverer to find latest revision path
Method constructs metadata_path and calls __init__
Handle case when no valid revision found with clear error message

tasks.acceptance-criteria: FeatureProviderBase.from_latest_revision(root, task) discovers latest revision, loads metadata, validates features, and returns initialized provider instance. Raises FileNotFoundError with clear message if no valid revision found.

unit: from_latest_revision() raises FileNotFoundError when no revisions exist
from_latest_revision() returns FeatureProviderBase instance when valid revision exists
integration: from_latest_revision() with mock revision directory initializes provider with correct metadata
Provider returned by from_latest_revision() passes feature validation

tasks.task: Write unit tests for revision discovery
tasks.description: Create comprehensive test suite for RevisionDiscoverer and FeatureProviderBase integration.

steps.description: Create test/unit/test_revision_discoverer.py
Add tests for _parse_revision_name with valid and invalid formats
Add tests for _validate_revision with various file combinations
Add tests for discover_latest with multiple revisions and timestamps
Add tests for task isolation and missing directories

tasks.acceptance-criteria: All tests pass with ./agent_bins/python -m pytest test/unit/test_revision_discoverer.py. Coverage includes: revision name parsing, validation, discovery ordering, task isolation, error handling.

unit: pytest --collect-only shows at least 10 test cases
